summary: Removed the dinosaur/fossil visual metaphor from the Observatory graph and converted it into a clean operational Knowledge Graph. Kept the product shell name while deleting silhouette/scaffold rendering, fossil naming, and pose-specific graph logic.
decisions: Keep DinoBrain as the product name, but remove graph-level dinosaur and fossil visual metaphors.
Use semantic cluster/layout naming instead of pose or silhouette terminology.
Keep detail access through hover and search rather than always-on long labels.
next_steps: Review the live graph at http://127.0.0.1:3847/.
Commit and release the Observatory design cleanup when approved.
